title: Web presence & landing pages
body: We design and build high-converting sites: structure, copy guidance, performance, and basic SEO. Typical projects range from single landing pages to small multi-page sites.

title: Paid acquisition
body: Campaign strategy and creative testing for Meta and Google. We focus on cost per qualified lead, not vanity reach.

title: CRM & automation
body: Pipeline setup: HubSpot or Sheets MVP, instant lead alerts, simple nurturing sequences, and handoff rules for sales.

title: How fast can we start?
body: Discovery calls are usually within 48 hours. Simple widget + routing MVPs can go live in days once access and copy are approved.
